description: Clean DevTools Console after reload with bridge live is required before public release.
host_permissions are broad and require release justification before public publication.
OpenAI/provider execution path must remain gated until provider consent/redaction/release review.
CSP does not include IPv6 ::1; default 127.0.0.1 remains supported.
LAN/CORS behavior remains conditional and should not be treated as public-release-ready without a dedicated review.
Minor mixed microcopy debt remains documented for post-gate cleanup.
